title: Dappled Forest | Third Drop 26.3
description: This is a backport mod of things from the third drop in 2026(26.3)
body:
[![Modrinth](https://i.postimg.cc/Gmw8qbWg/Wi0g-G3J.png) ](https://modrinth.com/user/Gospi) [![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/D00jjrX2/qe-YK6H3.png) ](https://discord.gg/xWzV3h7kBa) [![Curseforge](https://i.postimg.cc/dt7NG9Fs/gwr-Ub-OG.png) ](https://www.curseforge.com/members/gospi/projects)
---

**This is a backport of things, blocks, features, and structures from the third fall drop of 2026, which added drappled forest, poplar tree, and other pieces from the update.**
